trigger_eval.method: manual prediction (HOUSECARL_SKILL_AUTHORING.md §6.5 fallback; empirical run_loop needs a non-Windows host, session is Windows 11)
trigger_eval.followup: Flagged for empirical run_loop re-validation on a non-Windows host + one independent peer prediction check (§6.5 items 3-4). Tracked in STATE.md Phase-3 notes.

round_trip.method: Blind cross-type derivation: predict REQ_Bolt_Orcish (899DB9) from the same-material ARROW REQ_Arrow_Orcish (0139BB: Dmg 80, Val 3, Wt 0, AmmoWeight Heavy, AP Arrow Tier3) using the arrow->bolt rule (damage x1.2, weight class unchanged, AP series Arrow->Bolt at the same tier number), WITHOUT reading the bolt first; then diff against the houseCARL winner.
round_trip.target: REQ_Bolt_Orcish (899DB9:Requiem.esp), winner Requiem - Weapons and Armor Redone.esp
round_trip.notes: Exact match on all fields. Validates the bolt = arrow x1.2 damage rule (80->96), the weight-class invariance across type (Heavy unchanged), and the Arrow->Bolt AP-series swap at the same tier number (Arrow Tier3 0FD2B1 -> Bolt Tier3 AD397F).

round_trip.method: Blind cross-type derivation in the other direction: predict REQ_Arrow_Dwarven (0139BC) from the same-material BOLT REQ_Bolt_Dwarven (00D099: Dmg 84, Val 3, Wt 0, AmmoWeight Heavy, AP Bolt Tier3) using arrow = bolt / 1.2 and the Bolt->Arrow series swap, then diff against the winner. Chosen to confirm the x1.2 rule is exact in both directions.
round_trip.target: REQ_Arrow_Dwarven (0139BC:Skyrim.esm), winner Requiem - Weapons and Armor Redone.esp
round_trip.notes: Exact match. 84 / 1.2 = 70 confirms the x1.2 rule is exact both ways; the Bolt Tier3 (AD397F) -> Arrow Tier3 (0FD2B1) swap and the unchanged Heavy weight class reproduce the full keyword set; Flags NonBolt correct for the arrow.
